title: TapTweak
description: TapTweak derives a Taproot output key by adding a tagged-hash tweak to an internal key, optionally committing a script tree at the same time. It is the mechanism that binds key-path and script-path spending into one Taproot output.

resources.title: BIP 341: Taproot
resources.notes: Canonical definition of Taproot output key tweaking and script commitments.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Schnorr/Taproot Workshop
resources.notes: Workshop module 2.2 explains how key tweaks commit to arbitrary data in Taproot outputs.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Taproot
resources.notes: Practical ecosystem context for where TapTweak fits inside deployed Taproot usage.
